com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl

Class PlatformXmlDataSerializer

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.nexacro.java.xapi.tx.impl.PlatformXmlDataSerializer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    DataSerializer

    public class PlatformXmlDataSerializer
extends java.lang.Object
implements DataSerializer

    transform PlatformData to XML type defined in nexacro platform and output with OutputStream or Writer.

    Author:
    Choi, Jongkwan

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PlatformXmlDataSerializer()
      basic creator.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      protected java.lang.String encode(java.lang.String str)
      Transform character string to character string includable to XML document.
      protected byte[] getBinaryValue(DataSet ds, ConstantColumnHeader header)
      Return ConstantColumnHeader constant value as Binary type.
      protected byte[] getBinaryValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet current data as Binary type.
      protected byte[] getBinaryValue(Variable var)
      Return Variable data as Binary type.
      protected byte[] getBinaryValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet current file data as Binary type.
      protected java.lang.String getDataType(int dataType)
      Return X-API data type as acceptable data type.
      protected byte[] getRemovedBinaryValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet deleted data as Binary type.
      protected byte[] getRemovedBinaryValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet deleted file data as Binary type.
      protected java.lang.String getRemovedStringValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet deleted data as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getRemovedStringValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet deleted file data as String type.
      protected byte[] getSavedBinaryValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet original data as Binary type.
      protected byte[] getSavedBinaryValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet original file data as Binary type.
      protected java.lang.String getSavedStringValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet original data as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getSavedStringValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet original file data as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getStringValue(DataSet ds, ConstantColumnHeader header)
      Return ConstantColumnHeader constant value as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getStringValue(DataSet ds, int row, int column)
      Return DataSet current data as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getStringValue(Variable var)
      Return Variable data as String type.
      protected java.lang.String getStringValueFromFile(DataSet ds, int row, int column, int dataType)
      Return DataSet current file data as String type.
      protected int[] getTargetDataTypes(DataSet ds, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
      Return DataSet columns to be transformed data type(dataType).
      void setProperty(java.lang.String key, java.lang.Object value)
      Set property value.
      protected void write(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Output PlatformData as XML type.
      protected void writeBeginRoot(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output top tag Root start.
      protected void writeBinary(java.io.Writer out, byte[] value, java.lang.String prefix, java.lang.String suffix, int depth)
      Return Binary.
      protected void writeBinaryColumnHeader(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer, DataSet ds, ConstantColumnHeader header, int dataType, int depth)
      Output ColumnHeader with constant value to be transformed to Binary type as XML type.
      protected void writeBinaryVariable(java.io.Writer out, Variable var, int depth)
      Output Variable with transformation data to Binary type as XML type.
      protected void writeColumns(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes, int depth)
      Output DataSet columns as XML type.
      protected void writeConstantColumnHeader(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer, DataSet ds, ColumnHeader header, int dataType, int depth)
      Output ColumnHeader with DataSet constant value as XML type.
      void writeData(java.io.OutputStream out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Transform PlatformData to XML type and output with OutputStream.
      void writeData(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, java.lang.String charset)
      Transform PlatformData to XML type and output with Writer.
      protected void writeDataSet(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataSet ds, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int depth)
      Output DataSet as XML type.
      protected void writeDataSetList(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int depth)
      Output DataSetList as XML type.
      protected void writeDefaultColumnHeader(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer, ColumnHeader header, int dataType, int depth)
      Output DataSet general ColumnHeader as XML type.
      protected void writeDepth(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer, int depth) 
      protected void writeEndRoot(java.io.Writer out, int depth)
      Output top tag Root closure.
      protected void writeHeader(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, java.lang.String charset, int depth)
      Output XML document header.
      protected void writeRemovedRow(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes, int row, int depth)
      Output DataSet deleted data as XML type.
      protected void writeRow(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes, int row, int saveType, int depth)
      Output DataSet row as XML type.
      protected void writeRows(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes, int depth)
      Output DataSet rows as XML type.
      protected void writeSavedRow(java.io.Writer out, DataSet ds, int[] dataTypes, int row, int depth)
      Output DataSet original data as XML type.
      protected void writeString(java.io.Writer out, java.lang.String str, int depth)
      Return character string.
      protected void writeStringColumnHeader(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer, DataSet ds, ConstantColumnHeader header, int dataType, int depth)
      Output ColumnHeader with constant value to be transformed to String as XML type.
      protected void writeStringVariable(java.io.Writer out, Variable var, int depth)
      Output Variable with transformation data to String type as XML type.
      protected void writeVariable(java.io.Writer out, Variable var, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int depth)
      Output Variableas XML type.
      protected void writeVariableList(java.io.Writer out, PlatformData data, DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger, int depth)
      Output VariableList as XML type.

      • writeData

                      PlatformData data,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Transform PlatformData to XML type and output with OutputStream.
        Specified by:
        writeData in interface DataSerializer
        Parameters:
        out - OutputStream
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • writeData

        public void writeData(java.io.Writer out,
                      PlatformData data,
                      DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                      java.lang.String charset)
               throws PlatformException
        Transform PlatformData to XML type and output with Writer.
        Specified by:
        writeData in interface DataSerializer
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Throws:
        PlatformException

      • write

        protected void write(java.io.Writer out,
                     PlatformData data,
                     DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                     java.lang.String charset)
              throws java.io.IOException
        Output PlatformData as XML type. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order method Detail
        1 writeHeader(Writer, PlatformData, String, int) XML document header output
        2 writeBeginRoot(Writer, int) top tag Root start output
        3 writeVariableList(Writer, PlatformData, DataTypeChanger, int) VariableList output
        4 writeDataSetList(Writer, PlatformData, DataTypeChanger, int) DataSetList output
        5 writeEndRoot(Writer, int) top tag Root closure output
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        charset - character set
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeHeader

        protected void writeHeader(java.io.Writer out,
                           PlatformData data,
                           java.lang.String charset,
                           int depth)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Output XML document header.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        charset - character set
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeBeginRoot

        protected void writeBeginRoot(java.io.Writer out,
                              int depth)
                       throws java.io.IOException
        Output top tag Root start.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

        protected void writeEndRoot(java.io.Writer out,
                            int depth)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Output top tag Root closure.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        depth - indent depth

        java.io.IOException

      • writeDataSetList

        protected void writeDataSetList(java.io.Writer out,
                                PlatformData data,
                                DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                                int depth)
                         throws java.io.IOException

        java.io.IOException

      • writeDataSet

        protected void writeDataSet(java.io.Writer out,
                            PlatformData data,
                            DataSet ds,
                            DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger,
                            int depth)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Output DataSet as XML type. Internally summoned method order is as below.
        Order method detail
        1 writeString(Writer, String, int) Dataset tag start output
        2 writeColumns(Writer, DataSet, int[], int) columns output
        3 writeRows(Writer, PlatformData, DataSet, int[], int) rows output
        4 writeString(Writer, String, int) Dataset tag closure output
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        data - PlatformData
        ds - DataSet
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeColumns

        protected void writeColumns(java.io.Writer out,
                            DataSet ds,
                            int[] dataTypes,
                            int depth)
                     throws java.io.IOException
        Output DataSet columns as XML type.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        ds - DataSet
        dataTypes - DataSet columns to be transformed data type(dataType)
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

                           java.lang.String prefix,
                           java.lang.String suffix,
                           int depth)
                    throws java.io.IOException
        Return Binary.
        Parameters:
        out - Writer
        value - Binary to be returned
        prefix - Binary start tag
        suffix - Binary closure tag
        depth - indent depth
        Throws:
        java.io.IOException

      • writeDepth

        protected void writeDepth(java.lang.StringBuffer buffer,
                          int depth)

      • getTargetDataTypes

        protected int[] getTargetDataTypes(DataSet ds,
                                   DataTypeChanger dataTypeChanger)
        Return DataSet columns to be transformed data type(dataType).
        Parameters:
        ds - DataSet
        dataTypeChanger - DataTypeChanger
        Returns:
        DataSet columns to be transformed data type(dataType)

      • getDataType

        protected java.lang.String getDataType(int dataType)
        Return X-API data type as acceptable data type. Data type is not maintained, and transformed type is as below; for detail, refer to DataTypes.
        X-API data type transformed data type
        DataTypes.BOOLEAN DataTypes.INT 1 or 0
        DataTypes.LONG DataTypes.BIG_DECIMAL
        DataTypes.DOUBLE DataTypes.FLOAT
        DataTypes.FILE DataTypes.BLOB
        Parameters:
        dataType - data type
        Returns:
        transformed data type

      • encode

        protected java.lang.String encode(java.lang.String str)
        Transform character string to character string includable to XML document.
        Parameters:
        str - character string
        Returns:
        transformed character string
